description: Marketing manager transitioning to software development after bootcamp, with 6 years marketing experience and freelance dev work
resumeText:
Jennifer Park
jennifer.park@email.com | (312) 555-0374 | linkedin.com/in/jenniferpark | github.com/jpark-dev | Chicago, IL

SUMMARY
Former marketing manager transitioning to software development after completing App Academy's full-stack bootcamp. I bring 6 years of cross-functional collaboration, data-driven decision making, and project ownership from a marketing background, combined with hands-on development experience building production web applications. Comfortable communicating technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.

EDUCATION
App Academy — Full-Stack Software Engineering Bootcamp
Completed March 2024 | 1000+ hours of full-stack curriculum
Focused on JavaScript, React, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, AWS

B.A. Communication Studies — Northwestern University, 2017 (GPA: 3.6)

TECHNICAL EXPERIENCE

Freelance Web Developer — Self-Employed, Chicago, IL
April 2024 – Present
- Built full e-commerce storefront for a local boutique using Next.js, Stripe API, and Tailwind CSS; site launched to 200+ existing customers
- Integrated Shopify Storefront API for inventory management, replacing the client's manual spreadsheet process
- Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and deployed to Vercel; zero downtime since launch
- Ongoing client: adding product filtering, search, and discount code features

Capstone Project: ConnectLocal (App Academy)
- Built a community event discovery platform using React, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, and AWS S3
- Implemented JWT authentication, Google Maps API integration, and image upload with drag-and-drop
- Wrote 85% test coverage with RSpec and React Testing Library
- Deployed to Heroku and AWS; handled 50 concurrent users in load testing

MARKETING EXPERIENCE

Senior Marketing Manager — RetailCo, Chicago, IL
January 2021 – January 2024
- Managed $2.4M annual digital marketing budget across Google Ads, Meta, and email channels
- Led cross-functional team of 8 (designers, copywriters, analysts) to execute quarterly campaigns
- Built automated reporting dashboards in Google Data Studio and Excel that saved 6 hours/week per team member
- Grew organic search traffic 180% over 2 years through SEO initiatives; reduced cost-per-acquisition by 22%

Marketing Coordinator — AgencyName, Chicago, IL
June 2017 – December 2020
- Managed social media presence for 12 client accounts across Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn
- Coordinated product launch campaigns with combined reach of 2M+ impressions

TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Ruby, HTML5, CSS3, SQL
Frameworks: React, Next.js, Ruby on Rails, Node.js, Express
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Tools: Git, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Heroku, AWS S3, Docker (basic)
Other: Stripe API, Google Maps API, REST APIs, Agile/Scrum

CERTIFICATIONS
- Google Analytics Certified (2022)
- AWS Cloud Practitioner (in progress)
